tools.name: Pretext layout demo
tools.purpose: Text measurement and line layout without DOM layout thrash.
tools.description: Resize the window and watch layout metrics update. Testing ground for canvas and document-style interfaces.

tools.name: Smoke playground
tools.purpose: Canvas particle smoke with a live control panel.
tools.description: Tune motion, density, trails, and hue while the preview updates. Case study covers the shared engine and tradeoffs.

tools.name: DOPE Prompt Book
tools.purpose: Local-first prompt library and composer for reusable AI workflows.
tools.description: Build, organize, filter, edit, and assemble prompts. A larger app connecting the portfolio to real workflow.
